title: onobrychis saxatilis var. allionii
intro: Onobrychis saxatilis var. allionii, also known as Allion's sainfoin or sainfoin, is a plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and expectorant, to help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is rich in isoflavones, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Traditionally, Allion's sainfoin has been used in herbal preparations, including infusions and tinctures, to support respiratory and urinary system health.
